detail.description: Control the ragdoll and slash through all the enemies with your sword.If you’re hit by an enemy’s blade, you’ll lose the ability to move some joints.The key is to skillfully dodge the enemy’s attacks!

eventMentions.text: fun game but with how quick the levels are 30 is not enough. needs more. unfortunately i don't think
its just over and over again i dont even get new experiences
hilarious! this game needs to be expanded not much to change just more levels. maybe longer ones wit
best game in no net but please add new levels
